case_title: NEVEO MOSSER VS. JAVIER SILVA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILVA, JAVIER SILVA, ROSENDO AGUILIAR, JORGE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 350 TURK STREET, #T-909, SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO AS TO DEFENDANT SILVA, JAVIER SILVA, ROSENDO AGUILIAR, JORGE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
